title: Local Production Tracking Admission Draft Export
objective: Add a browser-local production tracking admission draft export that defines the later proof requirements for production quantity, labor, apparatus, progress, PM/lead review, audit/readback, and downstream customer/billing/payroll boundaries before any production tracking write path is admitted.
scope: Add an Export Production Tracking Draft action to the existing Field Prep Outputs rail.

Download one JSON artifact that includes durable field record draft summary, proposed production tracking packet, production tracking readiness statuses, proposed packet sequence, authority boundary flags, and blocked write boundaries.
Keep the export local-only and informational.
Extend the focused Playwright smoke to prove the downloaded production tracking admission draft artifact and zero mutation requests.
not_allowed: No Supabase, Render, Vercel, or Olares action.
No secret access or secret rotation.
No backend route or mutation route change.

No project import, workpackage rows, task rows, apparatus rows, field work authorization, assignment write, schedule/status write, durable field record write, production tracking contract write, production quantity tracking write, production tracking mutation route, production tracking audit write, production tracking readback route, hosted production tracking UI controls, production labor tracking write, production apparatus progress write, customer reporting export, billing/payroll export, customer completion evidence export, workbook macro, or workbook writeback.
No service, auth, DNS, ingress, or control-plane widening.

production_tracking_admission_draft.note: This lane creates local admission-design context only. Production tracking, customer reporting, billing, payroll, and customer-facing completion outputs remain blocked until later admitted packets own those write paths.

validation_steps: rg -n "PM Lane 154|Export Production Tracking Draft|production-tracking-draft|pm_lane_154_local_production_tracking_admission_draft_v1|mutationRequests\)\.toHaveLength\(0\)" PROJECT_STATUS.md docs/operations ops/agents apps/operations-web
validation_result: PASS: operations-web typecheck passed, operations-web production build passed, focused PM import-intake Playwright smoke passed with 1 passed, packet JSON parsed, guardrail search confirmed PM Lane 154/production-tracking-draft/zero-mutation evidence plus Desktop Codex parked language, and git diff --check passed.
sidecar_result: Read-only explorer Goodall confirmed PM Lane 154 should be the local production tracking admission draft export, using PM Lane 153 as upstream durable field record context and keeping production tracking itself not admitted. Desktop Codex NETA closeouts remain untracked and intentionally parked for a separate technical-authority review lane. They are not staged into PM Lane 154.
next_recommended_lane: Use this production tracking admission draft as the no-write proof checklist for a later production tracking packet. The next PM lane should either prepare a copy/paste executor packet for production tracking admission design or continue to customer reporting/billing/payroll admission context while writes remain blocked.
